glosses.vi: lười biếng; ăn không ngồi rồi
glosses.ja: だらだらする; ごろごろする

translations.en: I want to laze around today.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我就想什么也不做。
translations.pt: Hoje eu só quero ficar de preguiça.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn không làm gì cả.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я хочу нічого не робити.
translations.hi: आज मैं कुछ नहीं करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg bare slappe av.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg bare slappe af.
translations.ja: 今日はだらだらしたい。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; clause-initial frame setter; modifies the predicate; no inflection.
Modal auxiliary; present indicative, 1st person singular; verb-second finite head selecting a bare infinitive ('faulenzen'); expresses volition.
Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person singular; subject of the finite auxiliary 'will'.
Main verb; bare infinitive as complement to the modal auxiliary; denotes the activity intended.

translations.en: She wants to laze on the beach.
translations.es: Ella quiere relajarse en la playa.
translations.fr: Elle veut se prélasser à la plage.
translations.zh-Hans: 她想在海滩上躺着放松。
translations.ru: Она хочет просто полежать на пляже.
translations.vi: Cô ấy muốn nằm dài trên bãi biển.
translations.ar: هي تريد أن تسترخي على الشاطئ.
translations.nl: Ze wil lekker luieren op het strand.
translations.hi: वह समुद्र तट पर आराम करना चाहती है.
translations.pl: Ona chce się lenić na plaży.
translations.nb: Hun vil slappe av på stranden.
translations.sv: Hon vill lata sig på stranden.
translations.da: Hun vil slappe af på stranden.
translations.ja: 彼女はビーチでのんびりしたい。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of preposition 'an' + definite article 'dem'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase that takes dative.
Common noun; head of the locative PP 'am Strand'; dative singular (governed by 'an/dem'); denotes location.
Modal auxiliary; Konjunktiv II (present) form; verb-second finite head selecting a bare infinitive; expresses polite/softened desire.
Personal pronoun; nominative, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'möchte'.
Main verb; bare infinitive complement of the modal auxiliary; denotes the intended activity at the specified location.

translations.en: I’d like to laze around today.
translations.es: Hoy me gustaría no hacer nada.
translations.ru: Сегодня хотелось бы ничего не делать.
translations.pt: Hoje eu gostaria de ficar de preguiça.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi muốn lười một chút.
translations.uk: Мені б сьогодні хотілося нічого не робити.
translations.hi: आज मैं थोड़ा आलस करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj mam ochotę nic nie robić.
translations.nb: I dag vil jeg gjerne slappe av.
translations.sv: Jag skulle gärna lata mig idag.
translations.da: I dag vil jeg gerne slappe af.
translations.ja: 今日はのんびりしたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person singular; subject of the finite auxiliary 'würde'.
Auxiliary; Konjunktiv II (present) of 'werden'; verb-second finite head forming a conditional/potential periphrasis with a bare infinitive.
Temporal adverb; mid-field adverbial; modifies the predicate; sets the time frame.
Manner/modality adverb expressing preference; modifies the verb phrase ('faulenzen').
Main verb; bare infinitive complement of the auxiliary 'würde' in the conditional construction.

sentences.target: Nach dem Sport faulenzen wir auf dem Sofa.
sentences.reading: /naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt ˈfaʊ̯lɛnʦn̩ viːɐ̯ aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa/

translations.de: Nach dem Sport faulenzen wir auf dem Sofa.
translations.ipa: /naːx deːm ʃpɔʁt ˈfaʊ̯lɛnʦn̩ viːɐ̯ aʊ̯f deːm ˈzoːfa/
translations.en: After the workout, we laze around on the couch.
translations.es: Después del entrenamiento nos quedamos tirados en el sofá.
translations.fr: Après le sport, on flemmarde sur le canapé.
translations.zh-Hans: 运动完我们就躺在沙发上发懒。
translations.yue: 做完運動我哋攤喺梳化度嘆下。
translations.ru: После тренировки мы валяемся на диване.
translations.pt: Depois do treino a gente fica de preguiça no sofá.
translations.he: אחרי האימון אנחנו נזרקים על הספה.
translations.vi: Tập xong chúng tôi nằm ườn trên ghế sofa.
translations.nl: Na het sporten luieren we op de bank.
translations.uk: Після тренування ми валяємося на дивані.
translations.hi: कसरत के बाद हम सोफ़े पर पड़े रहते हैं.
translations.el: Μετά την προπόνηση αράζουμε στον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Etter trening slapper vi av på sofaen.
translations.id: Setelah olahraga kami bermalas-malasan di sofa.
translations.sv: Efter träningen slappar vi i soffan.
translations.da: Efter træning slapper vi af på sofaen.
translations.ja: 運動の後、私たちはソファでだらだらする。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; introduces a temporal PP; selects dative case.
Definite article; dative singular; determiner of 'Sport' within the PP headed by 'nach'.
Common noun; head of the temporal PP 'nach dem Sport'; dative singular; event reference.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person plural (agreement with 'wir'); occupies verb-second position after the fronted PP.
Personal pronoun; nominative, 1st person plural; subject of the finite verb 'faulenzen'.
Preposition; introduces a locative PP; with static location it selects dative case.
Definite article; dative singular; determiner of 'Sofa' within the PP headed by 'auf'.
Common noun; head of the locative PP 'auf dem Sofa'; dative singular; denotes the place of the action.
